titleStmt.title: SII 24.30: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 30. (A.R. No. 117 of 1947-48.) III PRĀKĀRA, NORTH WALL.

summary.p: Records a sale of dēvadāna land in Kīḻ-Pilāṟu in Pāchchil-kūṟṟam to Kāśyapan Kaṇṇan Nārāyaṇaṉ alias Vaiśravaṇa Bhaṭṭar of Tiruveḷḷaṟai, a Brahmadēya in Vaḍavaḻi-nāḍu in Ulagamuḻuduḍaiyāḷ-nāḍu. Another similar transaction by the temple executives to Aḻagiyarāja Mūvēndavēḷār is referred to in lines 9-11 of the inscription. The land given seems to have been named Gāṅgaiyarsurabhi-viḷāgam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
maṇimakuṭam Urimaiyiṟ cūṭi tannaṭi Iraṇṭu n=taṭa muṭiyākat tonnila manuvāṟu perukak kaliyāṟu vaṟuppac ceṅkol ticai toṟuñ cella veṇ viḷākam Eṅkaṇun=tanātu tiruniḻal veṇṇilāttikaḻa Orutani meruvil puliviḷaiyāṭa vārkaṭaṟṟivān=tarattup pūpar tiṟai viṭutan=ta kalañ corikaḷiṟu muṟai niṟ(p)pa vilaṅkiya tennava
jayapperuntiruvum paḻiyukantu kuṭutta pukaḻum celviyum vāḷāroṇkaṇ maṭan=tayariṭṭamu miḷātu kuṭutta veṅkari niraiyuṅ kaṅkamaṇṭalamum ciṅkaṇamennum pāṇiyiraṇṭum Oruvicaik koṇṭīṇṭiya pukaḻoṭu pāṇṭimaṇṭalaṅ koḷḷat tiruvuḷḷat taṭaittu veḷḷavaru parittalaṅkaḷum poru parittalaṅkaḷun tantiravāriyum Uṭait tāy
niṟṟalaivaraik kuṟukalar kulaiyak koṭ ṭāṟuṭpaṭa neṟitoṟum nilaikaḷiṭṭaruḷip poṅkoḷiyāramun tiruppuyattalaṅ kaḷum pola vīramun tiyākamum viḷaṅkap pārmicai mevalar vaṇaṅka vīra siṅhāsanattu Avani muḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovi rājakesaripanmarāna cakravattikaḷ śrīkolottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yā
�nūṟṟuvap piriyanum civayiṣṇavappiriyanum Uḷ ḷiṭṭa Āḻvār kanmikaḷellām tevar veḷār Evalpaṭi Ulakamuḻutuṭaiyāḷ nāṭṭu vaṭavaḻināṭṭu bramhadeyam tiruveḷḷaṟaiyil kāśyapan kaṇṇan nārāyaṇanāna vayiḻravaṇapaṭṭarkku nāṅkaḷ viṟṟuk kuṭutta nilamāvatu Innāṭṭu pāccil kūṟṟattukku kīḻ pilāṟṟu Āḻvār tevatāna
nān kellai tevaṟkārikuṭi nilat tukku vaṭakkum melpāṟ kellai māvaṭuṅkaḷattut tirutti celkaruṇi (1/2) nilam Araiye Iraṇṭu māvukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai keraḷān=takan vāykkālukku teṟkum Uḷpaṭṭa maṇaliṭṭile Onṟekāl nilam Ivarukku Ittanmattukku Innilattukku nila vilai ve
kaṭavarallātāka Ipparicu Icaintu kāśyapan kaṇṇan nārāyaṇanāna vayiḻravaṇapaṭṭarkku viṟṟuk kuṭuttom Āḻvār kanmikaḷom Innilam Onṟe kālum tiruttaṟat tirutta Āḻvār tevatānam vīrarājentranallūr veḷḷāḷan māvūruṭaiyān kaṇṭan tillai nāyakanum Ivan vaṟkattārume kāṇiyākak kaikkoṇṭu Ittanma
Aṟivariyān sajñaiyātanamaikku Āritan cirākavan taniiḷañciṅkattineḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Āritan cikākavan cikārimāṟaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku tiruvaṭivāranampi sajñaiyā- namaikku perumpuliyūr vaṇṭuvarāpatinampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai vatanaṅka tiruvaraṅkappiccar Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai ḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven nampūr kāṭṭirukkai
tirumāliruñcolai nampiyum tiruvālināṭu dāsarun tiruvaraṅkamuṭaiyānampiyum paṇṭāravāriyam Āritan Ārāvamutu puṇṭarīka num pāratāyan Ārāvamutum Āritan kecavan taniyiḷa(ḷa)ñ ciṅkamum pāratāyan śrīkṛṣṇan kecuvanum pāratāyan cīriḷaṅko keruḷavāhananum koyiṟ kaṇakku vap piriyanum Uḷḷiṭṭa Āḻvār kanmikaḷom śrīkāriyam muṭikoṇṭa coḻava
nārum ttu Ivar vaṟkkattārum Innilamum tiruttāte kiṭan=tamaiyil Innilam veliyilum kāṅkaiyar surabhi viḷākamākat tiruttun nilattukku kāṟ cey nilam mukkāṟ ceyyum Ivvaḻakiyarāja muventaveḷāṟku viṟṟukkuṭuttom Innilattukkicain=ta kiḻpāṟkellai mayakkalukku meṟkum llaikkum vaṭakkum melpārkellai keraḷāntaka
Aḷantu mikutiyāna nel koṇṭu Ittiru nantavānañ ceyum Āḷ Iraṇṭukku Āṇṭonṟukku nellukku tūṇiyāka Āḷ Iraṇṭukku nelp patakkāka vanta nellu Aṟupat vamutiṟkāka 2- kkum Innilaṅ Anupavittu Inta vīrarāja ntirunantavānam ttu ciya �ridāsarum Ivan vaṟkattārume Āḻvār kanmikaḷom Ippaṭikku Ivai koyiṟ kaṇakku
nampi Eḻuttu Ivai tiruvaraṅka muṭaiyān śrīvaiyiṣṇavarakṣai
Digital edition of SII 24.30 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
